info.title: HotReloadSentinel
info.description: AI-assisted .NET MAUI Hot Reload diagnostics — MCP server, environment validator, per-change confirmation, and bug report generator.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: AI-assisted .NET MAUI Hot Reload diagnostics sentinel.

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Full environment validation and hot reload diagnostics.

commands.name: pending-atoms
commands.description: Return unconfirmed change atoms as JSON.

commands.name: record-verdict
commands.description: Record per-atom verdicts for an apply event.

commands.name: draft-issue
commands.description: Generate a GitHub issue draft from hot reload verdicts.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Run as MCP stdio server for Copilot CLI.
